channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cunard Announces Refurbishment of Queen Victoria Cruise Ship
item.description: The Queen Victoria, one of Cunard's oldest luxury cruise ships launched in 2007, will undergo a major refurbishment from 17 October to 5 November 2026 at Damen Shiprepair in Rotterdam. The 2,000-guest...

item.title: Houthi Attacks on Saudi Tankers and U.S. Strikes in Red Sea Escalate
item.description: Yemen’s Iran-backed Houthi rebels claimed they attacked two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea, escalating tensions as the U.S. conducted its 12th night of airstrikes against Iran. The conflict over con...

item.title: Pastor Kanyari Reveals How He and Betty Bayo Started Their Relationship After a Sleepover
item.description: Pastor Victor Kanyari shared intimate details about how he met his late ex-wife, Betty Bayo, during a church service. The story began after a sleepover where they ended up staying overnight, leading t...

item.title: Angola sentences Russian operatives for election meddling and economic sabotage
item.description: Angola has sentenced two Russian nationals to prison terms for espionage and terrorism charges linked to alleged election interference and economic sabotage. The convictions come amid political tensio...

item.title: Troops rescue 11 kidnapped victims and arrest 21 suspects in joint operations
item.description: Troops have successfully rescued 11 kidnapped individuals and arrested 21 suspects, including terrorists, collaborators, logistics suppliers, and drug peddlers, during coordinated operations in Borno,...

item.title: Smart storage solutions for kids’ rooms: Organizing toys, books, and clothes
item.description: The article explores practical storage solutions to tackle the common issue of clutter in children's bedrooms. It highlights products like Neatfreak Kids Nonslip Clothes Hangers, which save closet spa...

item.title: White House Threatens China Over AI Theft Allegations Involving Moonshot and Nvidia
item.description: The White House has escalated tensions with China by threatening sanctions against the nation following allegations that a Chinese AI startup, Moonshot, stole proprietary technology from US company An...

item.title: Patrick Riang'a shares Facebook earnings after gaining millions of views on his page
item.description: Nairobi car dealer and entrepreneur Patrick Riang'a has shared details of his recent Facebook monetisation earnings after his page recorded strong growth in views and engagement. The businessman poste...

item.title: Herman Manyora Analyzes Ruto's Strategy to Stick with Kindiki Amid UDA's Ol Kalou Loss
item.description: Political analyst Herman Manyora has warned President William Ruto against replacing Kithure Kindiki as his deputy ahead of the 2027 General Election. Manyora argues that while Kindiki may not sway Mt...

item.title: Domestic Violence is a Gendered Issue with Deadly Consequences
item.description: The article highlights the gendered nature of domestic violence, emphasizing that it is often deadly and disproportionately affects women. It critiques political figures like Pauline Hanson for downpl...

item.title: Prince George's 13th Birthday: Family Life and Royal Responsibilities
item.description: Prince George, the eldest son of Prince William and Kate Middleton, is turning 13 and preparing for life at Eton College. The article highlights his relaxed portrait taken after Trooping The Colour, s...

item.title: Asylum claims rise after FIFA World Cup visitors enter Canada
item.description: Over 175 asylum claims have been submitted by visitors who attended the FIFA World Cup in Canada, according to Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC). The majority of applicants came from...

item.title: Styling Tips for Your Favorite Ruffle Blouse
item.description: The article discusses various ways to style a ruffle blouse, emphasizing versatility and confidence. It highlights pairing the blouse with different outfits like high-waisted jeans, skirts, or trouser...

item.title: Nigerian Striker Akor Adams Joins Newly Promoted Italian Club Venezia
item.description: Akor Adams, the Nigerian striker, has completed his transfer to Venezia, an Italian club recently promoted to Serie A. The move marks a significant step in Adams' career, following his previous stints...

item.title: South Africa increases small claims court limit to R30,000
item.description: The Department of Justice and Constitutional Development has raised the monetary limit for small claims courts from R20,000 to R30,000, effective August 1. This adjustment, the first since 2019, aims ...

item.title: Ashtine Olviga Shares Insights on Handling Criticism, Insecurities, and Faith
item.description: Ashtine Olviga recently shared her personal experiences and reflections on navigating online criticism, overcoming self-doubt, and the role of faith in her life. The celebrity opened up about how publ...

item.title: Judge and Guard Killed in Attack Near Mastung
item.description: District and Sessions Judge Abdul Hakeem Kakar and his guard were tragically killed in a targeted attack while traveling from Quetta to Mastung, according to officials. The incident occurred at Wali K...

item.title: Economic Challenges and Policy Responses
